titleStmt.title: SII 28.162: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 162. (A.R. No. 317 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records a royal order approving the following transaction.

Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Tirunaṭṭamāḍi, a kauṇiyan (one belonging to (Kauṇḍinya-gotra) and a tapasi (ascetic) worshipping God Āḷuḍaiyār, had constructed a channel named aḻagiya-tiruchhiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ-tiruvōḍai, made in the land which was his own kāṇi for raising cheṅgaḻunīr flowers and further granted land for meeting the expenses on the wages (koṟṟu) and clothes (puḍavai) of those who were to raise seṅgaḻunīr flowers in the tiruvōḍai. The land was assigned as dēvadāna-iṟai-ili (tax free land attached to the temple). The levies exempted included the antarāyam and pāṭṭam. The land granted for the latter purpose amounted to 3 vēli, one mā, 3(1/2) kāṇi and kīḻ one mā and it was already tax free (iṟai-ili) and lay in Āṟṟūr alias Rājanārāyaṇa-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu in Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, and it had been purchased. The extent of this land referred to, later was refixed at 3 vēli in the survey carried out in the year 16 of śuṅgam tavirtta Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-dēvar and the assessment of the ūr (ūril-kaḻitta-nel) as known by experience (anubhava-ppaḍiyāl) was assessed to be 366 kalam and nila-ōpadi on that land which was irai-ili was 3/4 (kaḻañju ?) and one kāṇi. They were stipulated to be paid, by the holders of the plots of land concerned, to the temple. The land was tax free only in Government account but the land-holders were not however exempt and had to pay the stated dues to the temple instead to the king.
There is a reference to a revision of assessment resulting in a reduction, in the proportion of 10: 6.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Irupattu nālu § toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum madhurān=taka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyat tirumāḷi
kaikkūṟu tillaiampalap pallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷuṭaiyārkkuk kumpiṭṭirukku
m tapassikaḷil kavuṇiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭamāṭikku Irājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūril taṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu tirunāmattukkāṇiyākat tantu ceyvitta Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvoṭaiyil tirucceṅkaḻunir
Ākkuvārkku koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalukkum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟuppatāka virutarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaināṭṭu Āṟṟūrāṉa rājanārāyaṇac caruppetimaṅkalattu Ivaṉukku Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilamāy māṟit tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam
muṉṟe Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ Orumā mukkāṇikkuc cuṅkantavirtta kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi niṅkal nikki nilamu veliyum muṉṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭum Innilattukku A
ṉupavappaṭiyāl muṉpu Ūril kaḻitta nellu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattaṟukalaṉe Irutūṇiyum nilaopāti Iṟaiyiliyāṟ kācu mukkāle kāṇiyum Iṟukkavuṅ kaṭavatāka nam Olaiyum Uḷvariyum Eḻutiṉapaṭiyum Intat tiruvoṭai ṭakkalum vilai
koṇṭu tirukkaioṭṭiyil Oṭukkiṉa sātaṉappaṭi kāmakkāṇi nākaṉ catācivaṉ peril Aṉniyanāmakaraṇattu Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Arumoḻi tevaṉ tillai nāyakaṉ brāhmaṇi Iḷaiyāḷ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāḷ pakkal vilai koṇ piṭākai rāṉa tillai nāyakana
llūrppāl [śrī]cuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku Uttama coḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum Iraṇṭāñ catirattum kkukkiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku teṟku Āḷuṭaiya ṉāyanār tirukkoṭṭakuḻi ṉāyanār tevatāṉattukku vaṭa
kku naṭuvup paṭṭa nilam Āṟumā Araikkāṇiyum Uḻaccāṇaṉ mātevaṉ nakkaṉ pakkalum veḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ Eṭuttaruḷiya cipātam tiruppuliśvaramuṭaiyāṉ pakkalum vilai koṇ mel piṭākai putumāṭap paṭṭāṉa kuntavai vatikku
vāykkālukku teṟku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu viṟapeṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattiṉukkuk kiḻakku ṭiyaṉ vo kkāl kulaikkut teṟku Avimutti[ śvaramuṭaiya ṉāyanār] nilattukku meṟku kaṇavativati vāykkālukku vaṭakku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṉ mumāvum Uḻaccāṇaṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ tirucciṟṟam
ṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa kiḻpiṭākai tiruvekkaḷamāṉa jaṉanātanallūrppāl śrītirucciṟṟampalavatikkuk kiḻakku Uttamacoḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu kaṉa kkukkiḻakku kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟku
vāykkālukku meṟku tirupperuntuṟai nāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Eḻu māvaraiyil tirunantavaṉappuṟa nilam mummāvarai nikki nikki nilam nālumāvum Āka nilam raṇṭumā Araikkāṇi kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiratte
ḻu nūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟṟiraṇṭum Iṉṉāṭṭut tirukkaḻumala nāṭṭu Akaram kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ taṉināyakaccaruppeti maṅkalattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya ninṟāṉcceri ceṭṭabhojaṉ ya jñamurtti bhaṭṭayājiyār pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa piṭā
kai teṉūril śrītevivatikkuk kiḻakku civapāta cekaravāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattuṇṭattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Orumāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Aṟupattu nālum Āka kuḻi muvāyirattu Aimpattāṟum tiruvo
ṭaiyākavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉtāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭic ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājanārāyaṇa muven
taveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cittirarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai vicaiyarāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai nantipaṉmaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum
prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyumpaṭippaṭi 2 yāṇṭu muṉṟunāḷ nūṟṟu nāṟpattaiñciṉāl Antarāyam pāṭṭa muṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikkut tirumāḷikai mulataṉattu Oṭukkiṉa Uḷvarippaṭi vāṇātarāyarum villavarāyarum ciṅkaḷarāya—
rum kurukularāyarum kaṉakarāyarum cerakonārum Ataḷaiūr nāṭāḻvārum puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kaṅkaivuṭaiyārum pāḷaṅkuṭaiyārum pantaṇainallūruṭaiyārum kuḻalūruṭaiyārum mukaveṭṭi kurukāṭikiḻārum Īṅkaiyuṭaiyārum Uḻantaiyuṭaiyārum pan
taṇainallūruṭaiyārum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṟkuc ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam Ākka kumpiṭṭirukkum tapasi kavuṇiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūril taṉ kā
ṇiyāṉa nilattut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭuttuc ceyvitta Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvoṭaiyil Ākkuvāṟkuk koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalukkum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Iṟuppatāka virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu kuṟukkaināṭṭu Āṟṟūrā
ṉa Irājanārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Ivaṉukku Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilamāy māṟi yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam muṉṟe Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ Orumā mukkāṇiyiṉāl nellu nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalane mukkuṟuṇi
Orunāḻi muvuḻakkāḻākku niccayitta nellu nūṟṟu nāṟppattu nāṟkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Uṭaiyār cuṅkan tavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi niṅkal nikki nilam mu ppatteṭṭāvatu niccayitta nellu nūṟṟaimpatteḻukala
ṉe tūṇi Orunāḻi Uri periyatevar tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku Irupattaiñcāvatu Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu muṉṉūṟṟukkalattiṉāl pattāṟākki nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalamum muṉṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭamuṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi
liyāka Iṭṭamaikku Iṉnilattu Aṉupavappaṭiyāl muṉpu Ūril kaḻitta nellu muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupattaṟukalaṉe Iru tūṇiyum IṟuppatuIt stops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
